description: A Market Research Analyst needs to analyze visitor trends in Excel using data from Matomo's Reporting API. Export the 'Visitors Summary' report for the last 30 days for Site ID 1 as a CSV file. Use the 'admin' user credentials (Password: Admin12345) for authentication. The API request should utilize the VisitsSummary.get method with the period set to 'day', the date set to 'last30', and the format set to 'CSV'. Save the resulting data to /home/ga/Documents/matomo_visitors_export.csv.
